author: potuz
content: Will reply there in a bit when I'm awake, I saw the ping a couple of times. I don't think the issue is about MEV but more about incentive alignment. However, I think this feature is so low priority that if there's any trade-off between complexity of implementation/maintenance and benefit I'd stick with not implementing it.
